correctness._note: validator-owned via MODEL_PROFILES['MiniMax-M3']; declared here for documentation. FP4's per-element error trips matched_ratio; gate on cosine vs an fp32 swigluoai reference (floor 0.9958 - margin). Plain SiLU scores 0.449 and is rejected.

win_measured.regime: 8xB200 TP4 graphs-ON decode, equal fidelity (GSM8K ~0.94-0.96 vs cutlass 0.98)
win_measured._note: measured on the pre-override shape (runtime flashinfer patch + sglang cutedsl path). The override here is the SAME epilogue; the GPU number is reproduced once optima_kernels nvfp4_moe_megakernel is built (M1.2) and re-measured through the seam.
